Select Primary

// MISSION BRIEFING

How It Works

Hostile Spartan units have taken Krait Court — a two-house suburban block. Push the street, the yards, or go loud through the second-floor windows. You will be inserted alone. Survive escalating waves — each wave deploys more hostiles. Health regenerates when you avoid fire. Headshots deal double damage.

W A S DMove
MOUSELook
L-CLICKFire
R-CLICKAim down sights
SHIFTSprint
SPACEJump
CTRLCrouch
RReload
VSwitch camera POV
ESCPause

An interactive training protocol walks you through everything on your first deploy.
